title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic GTM Product Manager Jared Sires built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that drafts customer replies in the user's own voice. The tool reduces administrative burden on sales representatives by automating email composition using Claude Code.
